metadata.title: Dental Point - Professional Dental Care Dr. Yavor Ivanov and Dr. Ekaterina Ivanova
metadata.description: Professional dental care at Dental Point in Varna with Dr. Yavor Ivanov and Dr. Ekaterina Ivanova. Modern technology, personalized treatment, and comprehensive dental services for the whole family.
metadata.keywords: dental clinic, dentist, dental care, dr Yavor Ivanov, dr Ekaterina Ivanova, orthodontics, pediatric dentistry, dental implants, prosthetics, Varna, Bulgaria, dental point, professional dental care
metadata.ogTitle: Dental Point - Professional Dental Care Dr. Yavor Ivanov and Dr. Ekaterina Ivanova
metadata.ogDescription: Professional dental care in Varna with modern technology. Dr. Yavor Ivanov and Dr. Ekaterina Ivanova from Dental Point are here for your smile.

layout.clinicSubtitle: Dr. Yavor Ivanov & Dr. Ekaterina Ivanova
layout.footerTagline: A dental clinic with modern equipment and personalized care for every patient.

home.aboutTextLine1: In our clinic, we combine next-generation technology with a personalized approach to every patient. We believe family health requires special attention, so we created a calm and secure environment where you can feel truly cared for.
home.aboutTextLine2: For your convenience, our office is equipped with X-ray for precise on-site diagnostics. We work in partnership with NHIF, providing accessible and quality healthcare.
home.ctaSubtitle: Book an appointment and experience professional care

contact.adminAwayExplainer: While active, visitors see a message instead of the contact form — uncheck anytime to restore it.
contact.awaySoonMessage: Our office will be closed from {range}. If you don't hear back from us before then, we'll get in touch as soon as we reopen.

team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Meet our specialists
team.person1Description: Dr. Yavor Ivanov combines experience in conservative treatment and implantology with exceptional attention to detail. He works with next-generation technologies to provide his patients with predictable and quality results based on an individual treatment plan.
team.person2Description: Dr. Ekaterina Ivanova focuses on the diagnosis and prevention of orthodontic deviations in patients of all ages. Her professional interests encompass modern periodontology and aesthetic restorations. In her work with children, Dr. Ivanova skillfully combines clinical precision with a playful approach, building lasting habits for excellent oral health in them.
team.ctaTitle: We are ready to take care of your smile
team.ctaSubtitle: Book an appointment with our specialists today

items.description: Restoration of a fracture affecting enamel and dentin using aesthetic composite materials.
Placement of a single titanium implant to restore a missing tooth.
Correction of open and unilateral crossbite using self-ligating braces.
Root canal treatment and filling with bioceramic sealer using modern techniques.
Correction of minor orthodontic irregularities using clear aligners.
Achieving fast results with at-home and/or in-office teeth whitening.

items.name: Andrey Andreev
items.text: Extremely careful. My teeth have never seen such a thorough cleaning of tartar.

items.name: nikolai kolev
items.text: Professionalism at a high level, friendly attitude, pleasant and calm atmosphere!

items.name: Silvana Ivanova
items.text: Professionalism and ethics! Extremely careful service, comfort and calm atmosphere.

items.name: V. Vasileva
items.text: Extremely satisfied! It's always pleasant to be taken care of by smiling and attentive specialists! 😊

items.name: Siyana Penkova
items.text: Very patient and attentive dentist! Excellent specialist!

items.name: V La
items.text: Professional service and excellent attitude. I recommend!

cookies.title: Cookie Consent
cookies.description: We use cookies to analyze website traffic and improve your experience. Essential cookies are required for the site to function.
cookies.notice: By clicking "Accept", you consent to the use of analytics cookies. You can change your preference at any time.

privacy.title: Privacy & Cookie Policy
privacy.description: Privacy and Cookie Policy for Dental Point
privacy.section1Text: Dental Point respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy & Cookie Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website.
privacy.section2Text: We collect the following types of information:
privacy.section2Item1: Usage data: Information on how you interact with our website, including pages visited and duration of the visit.
privacy.section2Item2: Device information: Browser type, device category, and IP address (anonymized).
privacy.section2Item3: Cookies: Small text files stored on your device to ensure a smoother and more personalized browsing experience.
privacy.section2Item4: Contact information: Only when voluntarily provided through our contact forms.
privacy.section3Text: We use cookies to improve the performance and usability of our website. Cookies are small files stored on your device when you browse our site.
privacy.section3Item1: Essential cookies: Necessary for the website to function correctly (always active).
privacy.section3Item2: Analytics cookies: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website (Google Analytics) — used only with your consent.
privacy.section3Item3: You can accept or reject analytics cookies at any time via the cookie banner on our website.
privacy.section4Text: We use Google Analytics to analyze traffic and user behavior. Google Analytics collects anonymized data about your visit. Your IP address is anonymized, and you can opt-out at any time by rejecting cookies in our banner. For more details, please refer to Google's Privacy Policy.
privacy.section5Text: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, or delete your personal data. You can update your cookie preferences at any time by clearing your browser's cache or by contacting us. We do not store personally identifiable information unless it is voluntarily shared via our contact forms.
privacy.section6Text: If you have any questions regarding this Privacy & Cookie Policy, please reach out via our contact page or visit us at: 2 Podpolkovnik Kalitin St, Levski District, Varna, Bulgaria.
